title: wolfhsm: SecretStore impl not registered in inventory
description: wolfhsm implements SecretStore (and WritableSecretStore is impl'd on the struct too per the stub) but only submits SigningBackendRegistration. from_uri("secretx:wolfhsm:label") fails with a confusing 'signing-only backend' error instead of routing to the SecretStore implementation. Either register a BackendRegistration or remove the dead SecretStore impl.
